Soft Mobility Documentation

  • Installation
  • Usage
  • Release History
    • Initial Release (YYYY-MM-DD)
  • Minimum Version of Python and NumPy

softmobility.classes.sphere.Sphere([radius, ...])

softmobility.classes.sphereassembly.SphereAssembly([...])

Assembly of sphere used to define a soft body.

softmobility.classes.softbody.SoftBody(...)

softmobility.classes.inputs.Field(func[, ...])

Field input (force field, magnetic field, ...).

softmobility.classes.inputs.Scalar(func[, ...])

Scalar input (active force, control signal, ...).

softmobility.classes.inputs.Flow(func[, ...])

Flow input (fluid flow, velocity field, ...).

softmobility.classes.inputs.gravity_field([g])

Uniform gravity along -z.

softmobility.classes.inputs.constant_scalar([value])

Constant scalar input with updatable value.

softmobility.classes.inputs.no_flow()

Quiet fluid.

softmobility.classes.solver.FlowBodyRollout(...)

Pure-functional rollout to simulate the advection and deformation of a soft body in a flow.

softmobility.classes.solver.FlowBodyOptimizer(...)

Gradient-based optimizer for design parameters.
